TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Uwe_Blab, title = Uwe_Blab, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uwe_Blab} }

S.FORM: Uwe Blab sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1962, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 3, Uwe Blab, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Uwe Blab sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1962, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 3, Uwe Blab, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: uwe βlaβ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, uwe βlaβ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
